title: Numeric, No Decimal Point Packing Codes (N)
breadcrumbs: Numeric, No Decimal Point Packing Codes (N)
text: Numeric, No Decimal Point Packing Codes (N) The N packing codes represent integral numbers. They are stored without a decimal point. Scaling No scaling can be specified for the N packing codes. Related Links Packing Codes for Numeric Data The Uniface Numeric and Float data types are associated with many packing codes. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
